name: billing-automation
description: Build automated billing systems for recurring payments, invoicing, subscription lifecycle, and dunning management. Use when implementing subscription billing, automating invoicing, or managing recurring payment systems.
capabilities: Create subscription lifecycle management with trial, active, past_due, and canceled states
Implement automated invoicing with line items, tax calculations, and PDF generation
Build dunning management workflows for failed payment recovery
Calculate prorated charges for plan upgrades, downgrades, and seat changes
Handle multi-region tax calculations including VAT, GST, and sales tax
author: sickn33
securitySummary: All 35 static findings are false positives. The external_commands detections are markdown code block fences (backticks), not shell execution. The network detection is a placeholder URL in example email templates. The blocker detections for weak crypto and system reconnaissance are standard Python code patterns (string assignments, ID generation) used in legitimate billing logic. No prompt injection attempts detected.
valueStatement: This skill helps developers implement subscription billing, automate invoicing, and manage payment lifecycles. It provides patterns for recurring payments, dunning management, proration, and tax calculations.
limitations: Does not integrate with specific payment processors (Stripe, PayPal, etc.)
Does not provide actual payment processing or merchant account setup
Does not generate real invoices for actual customer billing
Requires additional implementation for production payment security

useCases.title: SaaS subscription management
useCases.description: Implement recurring billing for SaaS products with monthly, annual, or custom billing cycles

useCases.title: Automated invoicing system
useCases.description: Generate and deliver invoices automatically with tax calculations and multiple format outputs

useCases.title: Payment recovery workflows
useCases.description: Set up dunning processes to recover failed payments through retries and customer notifications

promptTemplates.title: Basic subscription setup
promptTemplates.prompt: Create a subscription billing system with monthly and annual plans. Include customer registration, plan selection, and initial billing cycle setup.
promptTemplates.scenario: Setting up a new SaaS billing system from scratch

promptTemplates.title: Invoice generation
promptTemplates.prompt: Generate invoices for completed subscriptions. Include line items for base plan, usage charges, and applicable tax. Output as PDF.
promptTemplates.scenario: Creating automated invoice generation for recurring bills

promptTemplates.title: Dunning workflow
promptTemplates.prompt: Implement a dunning management process. When a payment fails, send customer notifications, retry on schedule, and handle subscription status changes.
promptTemplates.scenario: Handling failed payments and reducing churn

promptTemplates.title: Proration for plan changes
promptTemplates.prompt: Calculate prorated charges when a customer upgrades from basic to pro plan mid-cycle. Include seat additions and billing frequency changes.

bestPractices: Always test billing logic with sandbox payments before production deployment
Implement idempotency keys for payment requests to prevent duplicate charges
Store complete billing audit trails for compliance and dispute resolution
Use webhooks to synchronize payment status with your database
antiPatterns: Do not charge customers without explicit confirmation or trial consent
Avoid hardcoding prices - use configuration for plan pricing
Do not skip tax calculations, even for digital goods
Never store raw credit card numbers - use payment processor tokens

faq.question: Does this skill connect to Stripe or PayPal?
faq.answer: No, this skill provides implementation patterns and code examples. You will need to integrate with your chosen payment processor separately using their SDKs.

faq.question: Can I use this for one-time payments, not subscriptions?
faq.answer: The skill focuses on recurring billing. For one-time payments, you would adapt the invoice generation portion without the subscription lifecycle management.

faq.question: How do I handle taxes for international customers?
faq.answer: Use the tax calculator pattern with region-specific rates. For VAT/GST, consider integrating with services like Avalara or TaxJar for automated compliance.

faq.question: What happens if a payment fails repeatedly?
faq.answer: The dunning workflow defines retry schedules. After exhausting retries (typically 3-4 attempts over 2-3 weeks), the subscription is canceled or downgraded to a free tier.

faq.question: Can I customize the billing cycles?
faq.answer: Yes, the patterns support weekly, monthly, quarterly, annual, and custom billing intervals. You define the cycle in the subscription configuration.

faq.question: Is this compliant with PCI DSS?
faq.answer: The skill provides billing logic patterns. For PCI compliance, ensure you never handle raw card data - use payment processor tokens and their secure APIs.
